music.title: The Dark Side of the Moon

outdoors.title: Huangshan Summit
outdoors.description: Caught sunrise above the sea of clouds. The 4 AM alarm was worth it.

outdoors.title: Moganshan Trail Run
outdoors.description: 25 km through bamboo forests. Legs stopped cooperating at km 20.

outdoors.title: West Lake Night Walk
outdoors.description: Hangzhou in winter. The lake is better without the crowds.

outdoors.title: Qiandao Lake Cycling
outdoors.description: 80 km loop around Thousand Island Lake. Beautiful but my saddle had opinions.
